content.full_text:
Aug 7, 2000

Gary S. Selwyn
Los Alamos National Laboratory
Plasma Physics, P-24, MS E526
PO Box 1663
Los Alamos, NM 87545

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-00-037

Dear Mr. Selwyn:

This is to acknowledge that your request for advice, our file number W-00-037, is withdrawn pursuant to our telephone conversation of August 3, 2000. I regret that we were unable to respond to your request in advance of the Licensing Committee’s decision. Thank you for your courtesy in this matter.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: Lawrence T. Woodlock
Senior Commission Counsel
